title: Recreational hunting licenses; fees
doc_html:
§3002. Recreational hunting licenses; fees

            A. Resident licenses:

            (1) Basic hunting license                                                       $20.00/year

            (2) Deer hunting license                                                        $15.00/year

            (includes deer tags, archery and primitive privileges)

            (3) Waterfowl license                                                            $12.00/year

            (4) Turkey license (includes tags)                                         $12.00/year

            (5) Youth hunting license                                                      $5.00/year

            (required for hunting deer, turkey, trapping, and youth lottery hunts)

            (6) Bear hunting license                                                        $25.00/year

            B. Nonresident licenses:

            (1) Basic hunting license                                                       $200.00/year

            (2) Deer hunting license                                                        $100.00/year

            (includes deer tags, archery and primitive privileges)

            (3) Waterfowl hunting license                                               $50.00/year

            (4) Turkey hunting license (includes tags)                            $50.00/year

            (5) Five-day basic hunting license                                        $65.00

            (6) Five-day deer hunting license                                          $35.00

            (7) Five-day waterfowl hunting license                                $35.00

            (8) Five-day turkey hunting license                                      $35.00

            Acts 2021, No. 356, §3, eff. June 1, 2022; Acts 2022, No. 229, §1, eff. June 1, 2022; Acts 2024, No. 443, §2.
